_comment: Text for the /information hub page. Edited via the CMS at /admin → Site settings → Information page text. The links to specific info-pages below are pulled from the Info Pages content collection automatically (grouped by section).

hero.heading: Everything else.
hero.lede: Constitution, policies, safeguarding, insurance, members' resources and other useful odds and ends. If you're looking for something specific and can't find it here, the [committee](/contacts) can usually point you in the right direction.

items.title: About PFO
items.desc: What we do, where we cover, who runs it.

items.title: Membership
items.desc: How to join, current fees, what you get.

sectionBlurbs.governance: How the club is constituted and the rules we run by.
sectionBlurbs.safety: Safeguarding, insurance, and event-day safety procedures.
sectionBlurbs.participation: Anytime orienteering, training, and getting involved beyond events.
sectionBlurbs.members: Newsletter, rankings, trophies and other member-only items.
sectionBlurbs.admin: Expense forms and other administrative paperwork.
